briefdescription.para: BRR division operation to set BRR register with LPUART.

parameterdescription.para: LPUART clock.
Baud rate set by the user.
result

briefdescription.para: BRR division operation to set BRR register in 8-bit oversampling mode.

parameterdescription.para: UART clock.
Baud rate set by the user.
result

briefdescription.para: BRR division operation to set BRR register in 16-bit oversampling mode.

parameterdescription.para: UART clock.
Baud rate set by the user.
result

briefdescription.para: Check whether or not UART instance is Low Power UART.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the UART Handle.
(instance is LPUART) or RESET (instance isn't LPUART)

briefdescription.para: Check UART Baud rate.

parameterdescription.para: Baudrate specified by the user. The maximum Baud Rate is derived from the maximum clock on L4 divided by the smallest oversampling used on the USART (i.e. 8) (i.e. 120 MHz on STM32L4Rx/L4Sx, 80 Mhz otherwise)
(BAUDRATE is valid) or RESET (BAUDRATE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Check UART assertion time.

parameterdescription.para: 5-bit value assertion time.
result (TRUE or FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Check UART deassertion time.

parameterdescription.para: 5-bit value deassertion time.
result (TRUE or FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame number of stop bits is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame number of stop bits.
(STOPBITS is valid) or RESET (STOPBITS is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that LPUART frame number of stop bits is valid.

parameterdescription.para: LPUART frame number of stop bits.
(STOPBITS is valid) or RESET (STOPBITS is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame parity is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame parity.
(PARITY is valid) or RESET (PARITY is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART hardware flow control is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART hardware flow control.
(CONTROL is valid) or RESET (CONTROL is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART communication mode is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART communication mode.
(MODE is valid) or RESET (MODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART state.
(STATE is valid) or RESET (STATE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART oversampling is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART oversampling.
(SAMPLING is valid) or RESET (SAMPLING is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame sampling is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame sampling.
(ONEBIT is valid) or RESET (ONEBIT is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART auto Baud rate detection mode is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART auto Baud rate detection mode.
(MODE is valid) or RESET (MODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART receiver timeout setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART receiver timeout setting.
(TIMEOUT is valid) or RESET (TIMEOUT is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Check the receiver timeout value.

simplesect.para: The maximum UART receiver timeout value is 0xFFFFFF.

parameterdescription.para: receiver timeout value.
result (TRUE or FALSE)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART LIN state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART LIN state.
(LIN is valid) or RESET (LIN is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART LIN break detection length is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART LIN break detection length.
(LENGTH is valid) or RESET (LENGTH is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART DMA TX state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART DMA TX state.
(DMATX is valid) or RESET (DMATX is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART DMA RX state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART DMA RX state.
(DMARX is valid) or RESET (DMARX is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART half-duplex state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART half-duplex state.
(HDSEL is valid) or RESET (HDSEL is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART wake-up method is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART wake-up method .
(WAKEUP is valid) or RESET (WAKEUP is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART request parameter is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART request parameter.
(PARAM is valid) or RESET (PARAM is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_UART_ADVFEATURE_INIT
memberdef.initializer: ((__INIT__) <= (UART_ADVFEATURE_NO_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_TXINVERT_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_RXINVERT_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_DATAINVERT_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_SWAP_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_RXOVERRUNDISABLE_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_DMADISABLEONERROR_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_AUTOBAUDRATE_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_MSBFIRST_INIT))

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART advanced features initialization is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART advanced features initialization.
(INIT is valid) or RESET (INIT is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame TX inversion setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame TX inversion setting.
(TXINV is valid) or RESET (TXINV is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame RX inversion setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame RX inversion setting.
(RXINV is valid) or RESET (RXINV is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame data inversion setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame data inversion setting.
(DATAINV is valid) or RESET (DATAINV is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame RX/TX pins swap setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame RX/TX pins swap setting.
(SWAP is valid) or RESET (SWAP is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame overrun setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame overrun setting.
(OVERRUN is valid) or RESET (OVERRUN is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART auto Baud rate state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART auto Baud rate state.
(AUTOBAUDRATE is valid) or RESET (AUTOBAUDRATE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART DMA enabling or disabling on error setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART DMA enabling or disabling on error setting.
(DMA is valid) or RESET (DMA is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame MSB first setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame MSB first setting.
(MSBFIRST is valid) or RESET (MSBFIRST is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART stop mode state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART stop mode state.
(STOPMODE is valid) or RESET (STOPMODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART mute mode state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART mute mode state.
(MUTE is valid) or RESET (MUTE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART wake-up selection is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART wake-up selection.
(WAKE is valid) or RESET (WAKE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART driver enable polarity is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART driver enable polarity.
(POLARITY is valid) or RESET (POLARITY is invalid)

briefdescription.para: BRR division operation to set BRR register with LPUART.

parameterdescription.para: LPUART clock.
Baud rate set by the user.
result

briefdescription.para: BRR division operation to set BRR register in 8-bit oversampling mode.

parameterdescription.para: UART clock.
Baud rate set by the user.
result

briefdescription.para: BRR division operation to set BRR register in 16-bit oversampling mode.

parameterdescription.para: UART clock.
Baud rate set by the user.
result

briefdescription.para: Check whether or not UART instance is Low Power UART.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the UART Handle.
(instance is LPUART) or RESET (instance isn't LPUART)

briefdescription.para: Check UART Baud rate.

parameterdescription.para: Baudrate specified by the user. The maximum Baud Rate is derived from the maximum clock on L4 divided by the smallest oversampling used on the USART (i.e. 8) (i.e. 120 MHz on STM32L4Rx/L4Sx, 80 Mhz otherwise)
(BAUDRATE is valid) or RESET (BAUDRATE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Check UART assertion time.

parameterdescription.para: 5-bit value assertion time.
result (TRUE or FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Check UART deassertion time.

parameterdescription.para: 5-bit value deassertion time.
result (TRUE or FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame number of stop bits is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame number of stop bits.
(STOPBITS is valid) or RESET (STOPBITS is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that LPUART frame number of stop bits is valid.

parameterdescription.para: LPUART frame number of stop bits.
(STOPBITS is valid) or RESET (STOPBITS is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame parity is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame parity.
(PARITY is valid) or RESET (PARITY is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART hardware flow control is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART hardware flow control.
(CONTROL is valid) or RESET (CONTROL is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART communication mode is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART communication mode.
(MODE is valid) or RESET (MODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART state.
(STATE is valid) or RESET (STATE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART oversampling is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART oversampling.
(SAMPLING is valid) or RESET (SAMPLING is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame sampling is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame sampling.
(ONEBIT is valid) or RESET (ONEBIT is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART auto Baud rate detection mode is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART auto Baud rate detection mode.
(MODE is valid) or RESET (MODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART receiver timeout setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART receiver timeout setting.
(TIMEOUT is valid) or RESET (TIMEOUT is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Check the receiver timeout value.

simplesect.para: The maximum UART receiver timeout value is 0xFFFFFF.

parameterdescription.para: receiver timeout value.
result (TRUE or FALSE)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART LIN state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART LIN state.
(LIN is valid) or RESET (LIN is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART LIN break detection length is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART LIN break detection length.
(LENGTH is valid) or RESET (LENGTH is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART DMA TX state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART DMA TX state.
(DMATX is valid) or RESET (DMATX is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART DMA RX state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART DMA RX state.
(DMARX is valid) or RESET (DMARX is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART half-duplex state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART half-duplex state.
(HDSEL is valid) or RESET (HDSEL is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART wake-up method is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART wake-up method .
(WAKEUP is valid) or RESET (WAKEUP is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART request parameter is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART request parameter.
(PARAM is valid) or RESET (PARAM is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_UART_ADVFEATURE_INIT
memberdef.initializer: ((__INIT__) <= (UART_ADVFEATURE_NO_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_TXINVERT_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_RXINVERT_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_DATAINVERT_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_SWAP_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_RXOVERRUNDISABLE_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_DMADISABLEONERROR_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_AUTOBAUDRATE_INIT | \ UART_ADVFEATURE_MSBFIRST_INIT))

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART advanced features initialization is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART advanced features initialization.
(INIT is valid) or RESET (INIT is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame TX inversion setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame TX inversion setting.
(TXINV is valid) or RESET (TXINV is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame RX inversion setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame RX inversion setting.
(RXINV is valid) or RESET (RXINV is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame data inversion setting is valid.

(DATAINV is valid) or RESET (DATAINV is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame RX/TX pins swap setting is valid.

(SWAP is valid) or RESET (SWAP is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame overrun setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame overrun setting.
(OVERRUN is valid) or RESET (OVERRUN is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART auto Baud rate state is valid.

(AUTOBAUDRATE is valid) or RESET (AUTOBAUDRATE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART DMA enabling or disabling on error setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART DMA enabling or disabling on error setting.
(DMA is valid) or RESET (DMA is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART frame MSB first setting is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART frame MSB first setting.
(MSBFIRST is valid) or RESET (MSBFIRST is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART stop mode state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART stop mode state.
(STOPMODE is valid) or RESET (STOPMODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART mute mode state is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART mute mode state.
(MUTE is valid) or RESET (MUTE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART wake-up selection is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART wake-up selection.
(WAKE is valid) or RESET (WAKE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Ensure that UART driver enable polarity is valid.

parameterdescription.para: UART driver enable polarity.
(POLARITY is valid) or RESET (POLARITY is invalid)
